narrative:
Broadview Heights-01-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,266 registered voters, with 60.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points.
